task: Calculate the shipping cost for 4 pound package from Texas to New York.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully used FedEx’s rate calculator, entered origin/destination based on the provided state-only inputs, set the package weight to 4 lb, and retrieved visible shipping rates. The final page clearly showed the rates, including the cheapest option: FedEx Ground at $34.99 with no pickup selected, from the auto-matched TX 79567 to NY 10007. The extracted main text confirms the pricing and service names. Although the task was underspecified and FedEx auto-selected specific ZIP matches, the agent disclosed those assumptions and provided the calculated shipping cost.
final_result_response:
Confirmed from the full FedEx rates text:

Cheapest option: **FedEx Ground, $34.99**, delivered **end of day Mon, May 18**.

Other FedEx retail rates:
- FedEx Express Saver: **$75.88**
- FedEx 2Day: **$98.25**
- FedEx 2Day AM: **$111.69**
- FedEx Standard Overnight: **$175.70**
- FedEx Priority Overnight: **$201.02**
- FedEx First Overnight: **$241.63**

This was for a **4 lb package**, “Your Packaging,” from **TX 79567** to **NY 10007**, no pickup selected.
action_history: Opening FedEx rate page: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.fedex.com/en-us/home.html');
Opening FedEx quote flow: await page.locator('e13').click();
Testing state-only quote inputs: await page.locator('e17').fill('Texas');
Selecting Texas as origin: await page.locator('e51').click();
Entering New York destination: await page.locator('e20').fill('New York');
Selecting New York City as destination: await page.locator('e59').click();
Checking drop-off pricing without pickup: await page.locator('e99').click();

screenshots.title: Selecting New York City as destination
